overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking along a city street in a futuristic desert-edge urban environment. The character passes by a CHOOH2 gas station, various pedestrians, and transitions from commercial to industrial zones under clear morning skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic gas station sidewalk with palm tree landscaping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the CHOOH2 gas station

notable_agents.action: large man in yellow cap walking past the camera
woman in pink shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green and yellow gas station canopy with CHOOH2 branding
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
large rocky hills forming the desert backdrop
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a futuristic CHOOH2 gas station with a distinctive green and yellow canopy. Palm trees line the path and rocky desert hills rise in the background. Various pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including a large man in a yellow cap who passes close to the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with large advertising billboard structure

events.description: passing the large orange billboard structure marking the transition from gas station zone

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the billboard structure and gas price sign

notable_agents.action: woman in plaid shirt talking on phone while walking
green car driving along the street

entered.detail: tall orange metal structure supporting large digital advertisements
green CHOOH2 fuel price display showing rates

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a massive orange billboard structure that dominates the streetscape. The gas station canopy recedes behind while a green fuel price sign becomes visible. Pedestrians continue to pass by including a woman on her phone, and vehicles begin appearing on the road.

events.description: crossing the street while silver pickup truck passes by on the right
entering industrial freight area with parked cargo trucks

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering the industrial zone with freight vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver pickup truck driving past the crossing area
pedestrian in red jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green industrial building with multiple levels and weathered facade
large white cargo truck with trailer parked by the curb

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the multi-lane street as vehicles including a silver pickup truck pass by. On the other side, the environment shifts to an industrial area with a two-story green building and large cargo trucks parked along the sidewalk. The gas station is now visible only in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial freight corridor with power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking past parked industrial trucks and power infrastructure toward the city center

entered.detail: tall wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and power lines
concrete retaining wall with green graffiti tags
tall futuristic glass and steel towers rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues through an industrial freight corridor lined with parked cargo trucks and tall power poles. A concrete wall with green graffiti runs along the left side while futuristic skyscrapers become visible in the distance ahead, marking the approach to the city center. The area is devoid of pedestrians, emphasizing the industrial nature of the zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bustling commercial roadside into a desolate industrial corridor on the edge of a futuristic city. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside a green and yellow CHOOH2 gas station, moving past palm trees and pedestrians under the gaze of rocky desert hills. As the camera advances, the gas station recedes and the view is momentarily dominated by a massive orange billboard and a green fuel price sign. The scene then shifts as the character crosses a multi-lane street filled with passing vehicles, leaving the commercial hub behind to enter an industrial zone characterized by two-story green buildings and parked cargo trucks. Finally, the path opens into a freight corridor lined with graffiti-covered walls and tall power poles, moving away from the crowds toward distant skyscrapers marking the city center.
